raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California must continue investing in efforts that combat climate change due to repeated drought cycles, destructive wildfires, and rising sea levels.",
    "It is imperative that California reduce greenhouse gas emissions and increase utilization of renewable energy sources.",
    "The Cool Schools Bill would require the California Department of Education to conduct a study on safe indoor temperature ranges in public schools and develop recommendations.",
    "The School Greening Grant Program would support K-12 school greening efforts.",
    "Assembly Bill 586 aims to add climate change and environmental remediation to the list of community supports under the California Advancing and Innovating Medi-Cal initiative.",
    "The Statewide Strategic Plan for Highway Greening aims to increase highway greening with native plants by at least 10% in urban areas.",
    "The Climate Change Preparedness, Resiliency, and Jobs for Communities Program would establish a grant program to fund local communities that deploy multi-benefit climate projects.",
    "Assembly Bill 1172 would require California’s energy and utility regulatory agencies to assess the use of nuclear fusion as a reliable source of clean energy.",
    "Counties would be required to update their Emergency Operations Plan at least every two years in response to climate-related disasters."
  ]
}
```
